source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国银行重启5年期大额存单
topics.official_english: Bank of China Resumes 5-Year Large-Denomination Certificates of Deposit
topics.why_hot: Financial product changes affect personal savings and investment decisions, sparking public interest.
topics.share_angle: Explain what large-denomination CDs are and why the restart matters for savers.

topics.official_english: Multiple Measures Taken Across Regions to Defend Against Typhoon
topics.why_hot: Typhoon season directly impacts millions, with disaster preparedness a key public concern.
topics.share_angle: Highlight how Chinese cities prepare for typhoons and what residents should know.

topics.chinese_topic: 中央巡查组厉声质问：你们上去过吗
topics.official_english: Central Inspection Team Sternly Asks: 'Have You Been Up There?'
topics.why_hot: Inspection team's tough questioning reflects anti-corruption and accountability efforts, resonating with public.
topics.share_angle: Explain the role of central inspection teams in China's governance and why this moment went viral.

topics.chinese_topic: 阿根廷3比2艰难战胜佛得角
topics.official_english: Argentina Edges Cape Verde 3-2 in Thrilling World Cup Match
topics.why_hot: World Cup match with underdog Cape Verde nearly upsetting Argentina captivated global audience.
topics.share_angle: Break down the game's key moments and why Cape Verde's performance was historic.

topics.chinese_topic: 佛得角门将沃齐尼亚已成超级网红
topics.official_english: Cape Verde Goalkeeper Vozinha Becomes Internet Sensation
topics.why_hot: Underdog goalkeeper's heroic performance and backstory made him a viral star.
topics.share_angle: Tell the story of Vozinha's rise from obscurity to World Cup fame.

topics.chinese_topic: 某学院毕业后可直接进胖东来系谣言
topics.official_english: Rumor Debunked: No Direct Employment at Pangdonglai After Graduation from Certain College
topics.why_hot: Misinformation about job guarantees affects students and parents, prompting official clarification.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how to verify education-related rumors and the impact of fake news on career choices.

topics.chinese_topic: 同学被嘲“穿假鞋” 班主任严肃教育
topics.official_english: Teacher Gives Serious Lesson After Student Mocked for Wearing Fake Shoes
topics.why_hot: School bullying and materialism in education spark widespread discussion on values.
topics.share_angle: Explore how schools handle bullying and teach respect regardless of material possessions.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国船员在被韩海警扣押期间死亡
topics.official_english: Chinese Fisherman Dies While Detained by South Korean Coast Guard
topics.why_hot: Death of a Chinese citizen abroad raises diplomatic and legal concerns, drawing public attention.
topics.share_angle: Summarize the incident and the diplomatic response, emphasizing the need for fair treatment.
